spokenText: A high-fit tender appears with one week left. Your team must decide whether to bid, reconstruct every requirement, coordinate the response, and catch any amendment before submission. TenderGraph is an agentic tender operating system built for that complete workflow.
captions: A high-fit tender appears with one week left.
The team must decide, reconstruct requirements, coordinate the response,
and catch every amendment before submission.
TenderGraph is an agentic tender operating system for the complete workflow.

spokenText: Seven bounded agents cover discovery, qualification, requirements, bid preparation, compliance, monitoring, and outcomes. A human qualification gate unlocks the bid plan. Two unresolved requirements still block compliance, and no agent can release the bid. New evidence replans only the affected work.
captions: Seven bounded agents cover the full bidding lifecycle.
A human qualification gate unlocks the bid plan.
Two unresolved requirements still block compliance.
No agent can release the bid.
New evidence replans only the affected work.

spokenText: The operating layer is proven against a hash-verified public Chilean evaluation. Every conclusion is bound to exact evidence. The inspector exposes source, page, quotation, parser, authority, URL, and hash, while preserving a critical limit: a commission recommendation is not a signed contract.
captions: The operating layer is proven against a hash-verified public evaluation.
Every conclusion is bound to exact evidence.
The inspector exposes source, page, quotation, parser, authority, URL, and hash.
A commission recommendation is not a signed contract.

spokenText: The question runs through a ChatGPT-authenticated Codex session without an API key. GPT five point six composes only from admitted claims. The trace retains the model and Session ID. Fifteen code-owned gates reject invention, evidence swaps, scope contamination, leakage, and incomplete output.
captions: The question runs through ChatGPT-authenticated Codex without an API key.
GPT-5.6 composes only from admitted claims.
The trace retains the model and Session ID.
Fifteen code-owned gates reject invention, evidence swaps, scope contamination,
leakage, and incomplete output.

spokenText: Attach a new official PDF and TenderGraph extracts hashed, addressable evidence without granting it authority. Codex compares the update with every active conclusion. Six independent gates validate scope, evidence, complete impact, action semantics, and shadow authority. Nothing changes before human review.
captions: A new official PDF becomes hashed, addressable evidence.
It does not automatically become authority.
Codex compares the update with every active conclusion.
Six gates validate scope, evidence, complete impact, action semantics, and shadow authority.
Nothing changes before human review.

spokenText: A corrective resolution is the harder test. TenderGraph finds two supersessions: the original winner and loss explanation change, while the award rule remains valid. The result matches the versioned reference exactly and cannot promote itself into organizational truth.
captions: A corrective resolution is the harder test.
The original winner and loss explanation change.
The award rule remains valid.
The result matches the versioned reference and cannot promote itself.

spokenText: The enforcement is measured: forty-nine tests, twenty-three golden scenarios, six lifecycle gates, fifteen composition gates, six impact gates, and zero of eight injected faults admitted. This capture retains three real Codex Session IDs.
captions: The enforcement is measured: 49 tests and 23 golden scenarios.
It includes 6 lifecycle, 15 composition, and 6 impact gates.
The harness admitted 0 of 8 injected faults.
This capture retains three real Codex Session IDs.

spokenText: Codex accelerated architecture, implementation, adversarial testing, production diagnosis, and this product redesign. TenderGraph gives companies an agentic bidding team with governed memory. Agents can discover, qualify, prepare, check, monitor, and learn. GPT five point six can reason. Humans remain the authority.
captions: Codex accelerated architecture, implementation, testing, and production diagnosis.
TenderGraph gives companies an agentic bidding team with governed memory.
Agents can discover, qualify, prepare, check, monitor, and learn.
GPT-5.6 can reason. Humans remain the authority.
